api.body:
local timelineNames = Pixera.Timelines.getTimelineNames()
if timelineNames == nil then
	return {}
end
return timelineNames
api.name: getTimelineOptions

api.body:
if self.helper == nil then
	require "pixcHelper"
	self.helper = createPixcHelper(pixc, self())
end

local tlName = self.helper:getProperty("Source Timeline", "")
if tlName == nil or tlName == "" then
	return {"all Layers"}
end

local tl = Pixera.Timelines.getTimelineFromName(tlName)
if tl == nil then
	return {"all Layers"}
end

local layerNames = Pixera.Timelines.Timeline.getLayerNames(tl)
if layerNames == nil then
	return {"all Layers"}
end

local result = {"all Layers"}
for i = 1, #layerNames do
	result[#result + 1] = layerNames[i]
end
return result
api.name: getLayerOptions

api.body:
local topFolders = Pixera.Resources.getResourceFolders()
if topFolders == nil then
	return {}
end

local folderNames = {}

local function collectFolders(folderList, prefix)
	for i = 1, #folderList do
		local name = Pixera.Resources.ResourceFolder.getName(folderList[i])
		if name ~= nil then
			local fullPath = prefix .. name
			folderNames[#folderNames + 1] = fullPath
			local subFolders = Pixera.Resources.ResourceFolder.getResourceFolders(folderList[i])
			if subFolders ~= nil and #subFolders > 0 then
				collectFolders(subFolders, fullPath .. "/")
			end
		end
	end
end

collectFolders(topFolders, "")
return folderNames
api.name: getResourceFolderOptions

api.body: return {"By Order", "Match by same name", "Suffix - Batch"}
api.name: getMatchModeOptions

api.body:
local allRes = {}
local topFolders = Pixera.Resources.getResourceFolders()
if topFolders == nil then
	return allRes
end

local function collect(folderList)
	for i = 1, #folderList do
		local resources = Pixera.Resources.ResourceFolder.getResources(folderList[i])
		if resources ~= nil then
			for j = 1, #resources do
				local name = Pixera.Resources.Resource.getName(resources[j])
				if name ~= nil then
					allRes[name] = resources[j]
				end
			end
		end
		local subFolders = Pixera.Resources.ResourceFolder.getResourceFolders(folderList[i])
		if subFolders ~= nil and #subFolders > 0 then
			collect(subFolders)
		end
	end
end

collect(topFolders)
return allRes
api.name: getAllResources

api.body:
if self.helper == nil then
	require "pixcHelper"
	self.helper = createPixcHelper(pixc, self())
end

local errors = {}
local matchMode = self.helper:getProperty("Match Mode", "By Order")
local tlName = self.helper:getProperty("Source Timeline", "")
local layerName = self.helper:getProperty("Source Layer", "")

if tlName == nil or tlName == "" then
	errors[#errors + 1] = "Source Timeline not set"
end
if layerName == nil or layerName == "" then
	errors[#errors + 1] = "Source Layer not set"
end

if matchMode == "By Order" or matchMode == "Match by same name" then
	local folderName = self.helper:getProperty("Resource Folder (ignored on batch)", "")
	local timelineSuffix = self.helper:getProperty("New Timeline Suffix (ignored on batch)", "")
	if folderName == nil or folderName == "" then
		errors[#errors + 1] = "Resource Folder not set"
	end
	if timelineSuffix == nil or timelineSuffix == "" then
		errors[#errors + 1] = "New Timeline Suffix not set"
	end
end

if matchMode == "Suffix - Batch" then
	local hasSuffixes = (self._csvSuffixes ~= nil and #self._csvSuffixes > 0)
	if not hasSuffixes then
		local suffixList = self.helper:getProperty("Suffix List", "")
		hasSuffixes = (suffixList ~= nil and suffixList ~= "")
	end
	if not hasSuffixes then
		errors[#errors + 1] = "No suffixes defined (set Suffix List or import CSV)"
	end
end

return errors
api.name: preflightCheck

api.body:
if layer == nil or folder == nil then
	return {}
end

local clips = Pixera.Timelines.Layer.getClips(layer)
if clips == nil or #clips == 0 then
	return {}
end

local resources = Pixera.Resources.ResourceFolder.getResources(folder)
if resources == nil or #resources == 0 then
	return {}
end

local pairList = {}

if matchMode == "Match by same name" then
	local resMap = {}
	for i = 1, #resources do
		local resName = Pixera.Resources.Resource.getName(resources[i])
		if resName ~= nil then
			resMap[resName] = resources[i]
		end
	end
	for i = 1, #clips do
		local origResName = Pixera.Timelines.Clip.getAssignedResourceName(clips[i])
		if origResName ~= nil and origResName ~= "" and resMap[origResName] ~= nil then
			local origHandle = Pixera.Timelines.Clip.getAssignedResource(clips[i])
			pairList[#pairList + 1] = {
				index = i,
				origResName = origResName,
				origHandle = origHandle,
				replHandle = resMap[origResName],
				replName = origResName
			}
		end
	end
else
	local count = math.min(#clips, #resources)
	for i = 1, count do
		local origResName = Pixera.Timelines.Clip.getAssignedResourceName(clips[i])
		local origHandle = Pixera.Timelines.Clip.getAssignedResource(clips[i])
		local replName = Pixera.Resources.Resource.getName(resources[i])
		if replName ~= nil then
			pairList[#pairList + 1] = {
				index = i,
				origResName = origResName or "",
				origHandle = origHandle,
				replHandle = resources[i],
				replName = replName
			}
		end
	end
end

return pairList
api.name: findFolderPairs

api.body:
if layer == nil then
	return {}
end

local clips = Pixera.Timelines.Layer.getClips(layer)
if clips == nil or #clips == 0 then
	return {}
end

local pairList = {}

for i = 1, #clips do
	local origResName = Pixera.Timelines.Clip.getAssignedResourceName(clips[i])
	if origResName ~= nil and origResName ~= "" then
		local baseName = origResName:match("^(.+)%..+$") or origResName
		local targetBase = baseName .. "_" .. suffix
		for resName, resHandle in pairs(allResources) do
			local resBase = resName:match("^(.+)%..+$") or resName
			if resBase == targetBase then
				local origHandle = Pixera.Timelines.Clip.getAssignedResource(clips[i])
				pairList[#pairList + 1] = {
					index = i,
					origResName = origResName,
					origHandle = origHandle,
					replHandle = resHandle,
					replName = resName
				}
				break
			end
		end
	end
end

return pairList
api.name: findSuffixPairs

api.body:
if pairList == nil or #pairList == 0 then
	return {hasIssues = false, issues = {}}
end

local hasIssues = false
local issues = {}

for i = 1, #pairList do
	local p = pairList[i]

	local origExt = (p.origResName:match("%.([^%.]+)$") or ""):lower()
	local replExt = (p.replName:match("%.([^%.]+)$") or ""):lower()
	if origExt ~= replExt then
		hasIssues = true
		issues[#issues + 1] = "format mismatch: " .. p.origResName .. " (" .. origExt .. ") -> " .. p.replName .. " (" .. replExt .. ")"
	end

	if p.origHandle ~= nil and p.replHandle ~= nil then
		local origDur = Pixera.Resources.Resource.getDuration(p.origHandle)
		local replDur = Pixera.Resources.Resource.getDuration(p.replHandle)
		if origDur ~= nil and replDur ~= nil then
			local diff = math.abs(origDur - replDur)
			if diff > 0.001 then
				hasIssues = true
				issues[#issues + 1] = string.format("duration mismatch: %s (%.3fs) -> %s (%.3fs)", p.origResName, origDur, p.replName, replDur)
			end
		end
	end
end

return {hasIssues = hasIssues, issues = issues}
api.name: validatePairs

api.body:
if layer == nil or pairList == nil or #pairList == 0 then
	return 0
end

local clips = Pixera.Timelines.Layer.getClips(layer)
if clips == nil or #clips == 0 then
	return 0
end

local replacedCount = 0
for i = 1, #pairList do
	local p = pairList[i]
	if p.index <= #clips and p.replHandle ~= nil then
		local resId = Pixera.Resources.Resource.getId(p.replHandle)
		if resId ~= nil then
			Pixera.Timelines.Clip.assignResource(clips[p.index], resId, false)
			replacedCount = replacedCount + 1
			if doLog then
				pixc.log(self() .. ": replaced " .. p.origResName .. " -> " .. p.replName)
			end
		end
	end
end

return replacedCount
api.name: applyPairs

api.body:
if self.helper == nil then
	require "pixcHelper"
	self.helper = createPixcHelper(pixc, self())
end

local path = self.helper:getProperty("CSV File Path", "")
if path == nil or path == "" then
	pixc.log(self() .. ": CSV File Path is empty")
	self._csvSuffixes = nil
	return
end

local f = io.open(path, "r")
if f == nil then
	pixc.log(self() .. ": failed to open file: " .. path)
	self._csvSuffixes = nil
	return
end
f:close()

local suffixes = {}
for line in io.lines(path) do
	for entry in line:gmatch("[^,.:;%s]+") do
		local trimmed = entry:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$")
		if trimmed ~= nil and trimmed ~= "" then
			suffixes[#suffixes + 1] = trimmed
		end
	end
end

if #suffixes == 0 then
	pixc.log(self() .. ": no valid suffixes found in CSV - import failed")
	self._csvSuffixes = nil
	return
end

self._csvSuffixes = suffixes
pixc.log(self() .. ": imported " .. #suffixes .. " suffixes from CSV: " .. table.concat(suffixes, ", "))
api.name: importCsv

api.body:
if self.helper == nil then
	require "pixcHelper"
	self.helper = createPixcHelper(pixc, self())
end

local allRes = self.getAllResources()
local suffixSet = {}
local suffixList = {}

for name, _ in pairs(allRes) do
	local base = name:match("^(.+)%..+$") or name
	local suffix = base:match("_([^_]+)$")
	if suffix ~= nil and suffix ~= "" and suffixSet[suffix] == nil then
		suffixSet[suffix] = true
		suffixList[#suffixList + 1] = suffix
	end
end

if #suffixList == 0 then
	pixc.log(self() .. ": no suffixes discovered - no files matching the name_SUFFIX pattern found in library")
	return
end

table.sort(suffixList)
pixc.log(self() .. ": discovered " .. #suffixList .. " suffix(es) - copy/paste into Suffix List: " .. table.concat(suffixList, ","))
api.name: discoverSuffixes

api.body:
if self.helper == nil then
	require "pixcHelper"
	self.helper = createPixcHelper(pixc, self())
end

local errors = self.preflightCheck()
if #errors > 0 then
	pixc.log(self() .. ": preview aborted - pre-flight check failed:")
	for i = 1, #errors do
		pixc.log(self() .. ":   - " .. errors[i])
	end
	return
end

local tlName = self.helper:getProperty("Source Timeline", "")
local layerName = self.helper:getProperty("Source Layer", "")
local matchMode = self.helper:getProperty("Match Mode", "By Order")

local sourceTimeline = Pixera.Timelines.getTimelineFromName(tlName)
if sourceTimeline == nil then
	pixc.log(self() .. ": preview aborted - timeline not found: " .. tlName)
	return
end

local targetLayerNames
if layerName == "all Layers" then
	targetLayerNames = Pixera.Timelines.Timeline.getLayerNames(sourceTimeline)
	if targetLayerNames == nil then
		targetLayerNames = {}
	end
else
	targetLayerNames = {layerName}
end

pixc.log(self() .. ": === PREVIEW START ===")

if matchMode == "By Order" or matchMode == "Match by same name" then
	local folderName = self.helper:getProperty("Resource Folder (ignored on batch)", "")
	local timelineSuffix = self.helper:getProperty("New Timeline Suffix (ignored on batch)", "_copy")
	local newName = tlName .. timelineSuffix

	local resFolder = Pixera.Resources.getResourceFolderWithNamePath(folderName)
	if resFolder == nil then
		pixc.log(self() .. ": preview aborted - resource folder not found: " .. folderName)
		return
	end

	pixc.log(self() .. ": would create timeline: " .. newName)

	local totalMatches = 0
	for i = 1, #targetLayerNames do
		local srcLayer = Pixera.Timelines.Timeline.getLayerFromName(sourceTimeline, targetLayerNames[i])
		if srcLayer ~= nil then
			local pairList = self.findFolderPairs(srcLayer, resFolder, matchMode)
			pixc.log(self() .. ":   layer [" .. targetLayerNames[i] .. "]: " .. #pairList .. " clip(s) would be replaced")
			for j = 1, #pairList do
				pixc.log(self() .. ":     " .. pairList[j].origResName .. " -> " .. pairList[j].replName)
			end
			local vResult = self.validatePairs(pairList)
			if vResult.hasIssues then
				for j = 1, #vResult.issues do
					pixc.log(self() .. ":   [SANITY] " .. vResult.issues[j])
				end
			end
			totalMatches = totalMatches + #pairList
		else
			pixc.log(self() .. ":   layer [" .. targetLayerNames[i] .. "]: not found on source timeline")
		end
	end

	pixc.log(self() .. ": preview summary: " .. totalMatches .. " clip(s) would be replaced in " .. newName)

elseif matchMode == "Suffix - Batch" then
	local suffixes = {}
	if self._csvSuffixes ~= nil and #self._csvSuffixes > 0 then
		suffixes = self._csvSuffixes
	else
		local suffixList = self.helper:getProperty("Suffix List", "")
		for entry in suffixList:gmatch("[^,.:;%s]+") do
			local trimmed = entry:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$")
			if trimmed ~= nil and trimmed ~= "" then
				suffixes[#suffixes + 1] = trimmed
			end
		end
	end

	local allResources = self.getAllResources()
	local totalTimelines = #suffixes
	local totalClips = 0

	for si = 1, #suffixes do
		local suffix = suffixes[si]
		local newName = tlName .. "_" .. suffix
		pixc.log(self() .. ": [" .. si .. "/" .. #suffixes .. "] would create: " .. newName)

		local suffixClips = 0
		for i = 1, #targetLayerNames do
			local srcLayer = Pixera.Timelines.Timeline.getLayerFromName(sourceTimeline, targetLayerNames[i])
			if srcLayer ~= nil then
				local pairList = self.findSuffixPairs(srcLayer, allResources, suffix)
				pixc.log(self() .. ":   layer [" .. targetLayerNames[i] .. "]: " .. #pairList .. " clip(s) would be replaced")
				for j = 1, #pairList do
					pixc.log(self() .. ":     " .. pairList[j].origResName .. " -> " .. pairList[j].replName)
				end
				local vResult = self.validatePairs(pairList)
				if vResult.hasIssues then
					for j = 1, #vResult.issues do
						pixc.log(self() .. ":   [SANITY] " .. vResult.issues[j])
					end
				end
				suffixClips = suffixClips + #pairList
			end
		end

		totalClips = totalClips + suffixClips
	end

	pixc.log(self() .. ": preview summary: " .. totalTimelines .. " timeline(s) would be created, " .. totalClips .. " clip(s) total would be replaced")
end

pixc.log(self() .. ": === PREVIEW END ===")
api.name: Preview

api.body:
if self.helper == nil then
	require "pixcHelper"
	self.helper = createPixcHelper(pixc, self())
end

local errors = self.preflightCheck()
if #errors > 0 then
	pixc.log(self() .. ": execute aborted - pre-flight check failed:")
	for i = 1, #errors do
		pixc.log(self() .. ":   - " .. errors[i])
	end
	return
end

local tlName = self.helper:getProperty("Source Timeline", "")
local layerName = self.helper:getProperty("Source Layer", "")
local matchMode = self.helper:getProperty("Match Mode", "By Order")
local doLog = self.helper.toBool(self.helper:getProperty("Log Messages", "true"))
local stopOnFail = self.helper.toBool(self.helper:getProperty("Stop on sanity check fail", "true"))

local sourceTimeline = Pixera.Timelines.getTimelineFromName(tlName)
if sourceTimeline == nil then
	pixc.log(self() .. ": timeline not found: " .. tlName)
	return
end

local targetLayerNames
if layerName == "all Layers" then
	targetLayerNames = Pixera.Timelines.Timeline.getLayerNames(sourceTimeline)
	if targetLayerNames == nil then
		targetLayerNames = {}
	end
else
	targetLayerNames = {layerName}
end

if matchMode == "By Order" or matchMode == "Match by same name" then
	local folderName = self.helper:getProperty("Resource Folder (ignored on batch)", "")
	local timelineSuffix = self.helper:getProperty("New Timeline Suffix (ignored on batch)", "_copy")

	local resFolder = Pixera.Resources.getResourceFolderWithNamePath(folderName)
	if resFolder == nil then
		pixc.log(self() .. ": resource folder not found: " .. folderName)
		return
	end

	local hasAnyIssues = false
	for i = 1, #targetLayerNames do
		local srcLayer = Pixera.Timelines.Timeline.getLayerFromName(sourceTimeline, targetLayerNames[i])
		if srcLayer ~= nil then
			local pairList = self.findFolderPairs(srcLayer, resFolder, matchMode)
			local vResult = self.validatePairs(pairList)
			if vResult.hasIssues then
				hasAnyIssues = true
				for j = 1, #vResult.issues do
					pixc.log(self() .. ": [SANITY] layer [" .. targetLayerNames[i] .. "]: " .. vResult.issues[j])
				end
			end
		end
	end

	if hasAnyIssues and stopOnFail then
		pixc.log(self() .. ": execute aborted - sanity check failed (uncheck 'Stop on sanity check fail' to proceed anyway)")
		return
	end

	local newTimeline = Pixera.Timelines.Timeline.duplicateThis(sourceTimeline, false)
	if newTimeline == nil then
		pixc.log(self() .. ": failed to duplicate timeline")
		return
	end

	local newName = tlName .. timelineSuffix
	Pixera.Timelines.Timeline.setName(newTimeline, newName)

	local totalReplaced = 0
	for i = 1, #targetLayerNames do
		local srcLayer = Pixera.Timelines.Timeline.getLayerFromName(sourceTimeline, targetLayerNames[i])
		local dupLayer = Pixera.Timelines.Timeline.getLayerFromName(newTimeline, targetLayerNames[i])
		if srcLayer ~= nil and dupLayer ~= nil then
			local pairList = self.findFolderPairs(srcLayer, resFolder, matchMode)
			totalReplaced = totalReplaced + self.applyPairs(dupLayer, pairList, doLog)
		elseif dupLayer == nil then
			pixc.log(self() .. ": layer '" .. targetLayerNames[i] .. "' not found on duplicate")
		end
	end

	if layerName == "all Layers" then
		pixc.log(self() .. ": done - replaced " .. totalReplaced .. " clips across all layers in " .. newName)
	else
		pixc.log(self() .. ": done - replaced " .. totalReplaced .. " clips in " .. newName)
	end

elseif matchMode == "Suffix - Batch" then
	local suffixes = {}
	if self._csvSuffixes ~= nil and #self._csvSuffixes > 0 then
		suffixes = self._csvSuffixes
		if doLog then
			pixc.log(self() .. ": using " .. #suffixes .. " suffixes from CSV import")
		end
	else
		local suffixList = self.helper:getProperty("Suffix List", "")
		for entry in suffixList:gmatch("[^,.:;%s]+") do
			local trimmed = entry:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$")
			if trimmed ~= nil and trimmed ~= "" then
				suffixes[#suffixes + 1] = trimmed
			end
		end
		if #suffixes == 0 then
			pixc.log(self() .. ": no valid suffixes found in Suffix List")
			return
		end
	end

	pixc.log(self() .. ": batch starting - " .. #suffixes .. " suffixes")

	local allResources = self.getAllResources()

	for si = 1, #suffixes do
		local suffix = suffixes[si]

		local hasAnyIssues = false
		for i = 1, #targetLayerNames do
			local srcLayer = Pixera.Timelines.Timeline.getLayerFromName(sourceTimeline, targetLayerNames[i])
			if srcLayer ~= nil then
				local pairList = self.findSuffixPairs(srcLayer, allResources, suffix)
				local vResult = self.validatePairs(pairList)
				if vResult.hasIssues then
					hasAnyIssues = true
					for j = 1, #vResult.issues do
						pixc.log(self() .. ": [SANITY][" .. suffix .. "] layer [" .. targetLayerNames[i] .. "]: " .. vResult.issues[j])
					end
				end
			end
		end

		if hasAnyIssues and stopOnFail then
			pixc.log(self() .. ": [" .. si .. "/" .. #suffixes .. "] skipping suffix '" .. suffix .. "' - sanity check failed")
		else
			local newTimeline = Pixera.Timelines.Timeline.duplicateThis(sourceTimeline, false)
			if newTimeline == nil then
				pixc.log(self() .. ": [" .. si .. "/" .. #suffixes .. "] failed to duplicate for suffix '" .. suffix .. "' - aborting batch")
				return
			end

			local newName = tlName .. "_" .. suffix
			Pixera.Timelines.Timeline.setName(newTimeline, newName)

			local totalReplaced = 0
			local layerFailed = false

			for i = 1, #targetLayerNames do
				local srcLayer = Pixera.Timelines.Timeline.getLayerFromName(sourceTimeline, targetLayerNames[i])
				local dupLayer = Pixera.Timelines.Timeline.getLayerFromName(newTimeline, targetLayerNames[i])
				if dupLayer == nil then
					pixc.log(self() .. ": layer '" .. targetLayerNames[i] .. "' not found on duplicate - removing partial timeline")
					layerFailed = true
					break
				end
				if srcLayer ~= nil then
					local pairList = self.findSuffixPairs(srcLayer, allResources, suffix)
					totalReplaced = totalReplaced + self.applyPairs(dupLayer, pairList, doLog)
				end
			end

			if layerFailed then
				Pixera.Timelines.Timeline.removeThis(newTimeline)
				pixc.log(self() .. ": [" .. si .. "/" .. #suffixes .. "] removed partial timeline for suffix '" .. suffix .. "'")
			else
				pixc.log(self() .. ": [" .. si .. "/" .. #suffixes .. "] " .. newName .. " - " .. totalReplaced .. " clips replaced")
			end
		end
	end

	pixc.log(self() .. ": batch complete")
else
	pixc.log(self() .. ": unknown match mode: " .. tostring(matchMode))
end
api.name: Execute

properties.cont: Results are logged - copy/paste into Suffix List
properties.name: Suffix Discovery Hint

properties.cont:
TimelineDuplicator v1.2 — Duplicates a source timeline and replaces clip resources on the selected layer(s).

MATCH MODE:
- By Order: replaces clips with resources from the selected folder sequentially.
- Match by same name: replaces clips whose assigned resource filename matches a resource in the selected folder.
- Suffix - Batch: creates one new timeline per suffix (e.g. DE, EN, FR). Searches ALL resource folders for files named originalClip_suffix. New timelines are named SourceTimeline_suffix.

SOURCE LAYER:
- Select a specific layer, or choose 'all Layers' to apply replacement across every layer.

SUFFIX - BATCH SETUP:
- Enter suffixes in Suffix List, separated by comma, semicolon, colon, or dot (e.g. DE,EN,FR).
- Or paste a full CSV file path into CSV File Path and click Import CSV.
- Or click Discover Suffixes to scan the resource library and auto-extract suffixes. Results shown in log - copy/paste into Suffix List.
- Resource Folder and New Timeline Suffix are ignored in Suffix - Batch mode.

SANITY CHECK:
- Before duplicating, each replacement resource is checked for format (extension) and duration against the original clip. All mismatches are logged.
- If 'Stop on sanity check fail' is checked, the timeline for that check is skipped entirely.

DRY-RUN:
- Trigger Preview to see exactly what would be replaced without making any changes. Sanity check results are included in the preview log.

Trigger Execute to run. The Execute slot fires an output signal when the operation completes.
properties.name: Description
